title: Fix AdminUser Partner Level Dropdown & Add Asistenmu Dashboard Section

requirements.text: In /dashboard/internal, inside the AdminUser section's Pending User list, replace the plain Partner text with a dropdown (options: Junior, Senior, Expert) controlled by a `partnerLevel` state, and add a text input for Verified Skill (comma-separated) below it — both visible only when the user's role is 'Partner'.

quotes: Ganti bagian Partner di Pending User jadi dropdown

acceptanceCriteria: When a pending user has role 'Partner', a dropdown with options Junior / Senior / Expert appears instead of a plain text label.
A text input labeled 'Verified Skill (pisahkan koma)' appears below the dropdown for Partner users.
partnerLevel and verifiedSkillInput are managed as local React state.
The dropdown and skill input do not appear for non-Partner pending users.

requirements.text: Add an `AsistenmuDashboardSection` component to /dashboard/internal that is shown when the logged-in role is 'Asistenmu'. It must include: (1) a summary grid with cards for List Client, Total Task, and per-status counts (PermintaanBaru, QAAsistenmu, RevisiClient, DitolakPartner, ReviewClient, Selesai); (2) collapsible task sections for each of those six statuses with a filter input (by ID or client name) and per-task action buttons (Delegasikan Task for PermintaanBaru, Kirim Review ke Client for QAAsistenmu, Kirimkan Revisi ke Partner + Selesaikan Task for RevisiClient, Delegasikan Ulang for DitolakPartner); (3) a modal for delegating a task with fields: Partner (id/principalId/nama/skill), Jam Efektif, Unit Layanan Terpakai, Link GDrive Internal, Link GDrive Client, and Batal/Delegasikan buttons; (4) a Tiket collapsible section with filter and a Resolve button for unresolved tickets; (5) a History collapsible section with filter. All data is local mock state (no backend calls required).

quotes: buatkan dashboard Asistenmu di page /dashboard/internal seperti role lainnya

acceptanceCriteria: AsistenmuDashboardSection renders only when the current user role is 'Asistenmu'.
Summary cards display correct counts derived from the local tasks state.
Each of the six task statuses has its own collapsible section with a working filter input.
Action buttons match the specified type per section (Delegasikan Task, Kirim Review ke Client, etc.).
Clicking 'Delegasikan Task' or 'Delegasikan Ulang' opens the delegation modal pre-filled with the selected task ID.
The delegation modal has all five input fields and Batal / Delegasikan buttons; Batal closes the modal.
Tiket section shows tickets from local state with a filter and a Resolve button for non-resolved tickets.
History section shows history items from local state with a filter input.

requirements.text: Ensure the Superadmin role at /dashboard/internal can view all internal dashboard sections (AdminUser, Asistenmu, AdminFinance, and any others) without restriction — i.e., the role-based conditional rendering must allow Superadmin to see every section.

quotes: untuk Dashboard superadmin itu tidak ada batasan view karena dia adalah admin jadi dia bisa liat semua fitur dashboard internal lain

acceptanceCriteria: When the logged-in role is 'Superadmin', all dashboard sections (AdminUser, Asistenmu, AdminFinance, etc.) are rendered simultaneously.
No section is hidden or restricted for the Superadmin role.

requirements.text: Do not modify the AdminFinance dashboard section — its existing UI, layout, and logic must remain exactly as-is.

quotes: jangan ubah tampilan yang sudah ada di AdminFinance

acceptanceCriteria: The AdminFinance section in /dashboard/internal is pixel-identical to the version before these changes.
No props, state, or rendering logic of AdminFinanceDashboardSection is altered.

constraints: Do not modify AdminFinance dashboard section in any way.
All new data (tasks, tickets, history) must use local mock state — no backend calls.
Do not change any file listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Backend persistence or API integration for Asistenmu tasks, tickets, or history.
Real partner search or lookup logic in the delegation modal.
Changes to any page other than /dashboard/internal.
